name: production-lane
description: Element 22's Production Lane plugin. /validate is the Keep/Refactor/Redesign/Reject gate that turns a packaged prototype into a production proposal. /propose starts a production-lane proposal directly. /from-design starts from a Claude Design handoff bundle. /promote governs feature-flag rollouts. spec-refiner and drift-monitor agents keep specs honest. SOC2 governance overlay applies on top.
